abort.mqtt_not_configured: Home Assistant messaging (MQTT) is not set up. Please install and enable the MQTT integration, then try again.
abort.invalid_discovery: Invalid discovery information. Please try again.
abort.use_zeroconf: Cala devices advertise themselves on the network. When one is discovered it will appear in the list above. Ensure the device is powered on and on the same network.
abort.invalid_host: A valid device host is required.
abort.invalid_device_id: A valid device ID is required.

manual.title: Manual setup
manual.description: Enter the Cala device network details.

pair.description: Enter the pairing code shown on the Cala device (device_id: {device_id}).

provision.description:
To pair your Cala you need to get the pairing code from the device: Settings → Advanced → Home Assistant.
Please create a unique MQTT username and password in your MQTT broker. Enter those credentials here.

advanced.name: Advanced
advanced.description: Broker host and port. Most users can leave these as default.

errors.mqtt_not_configured: Home Assistant messaging (MQTT) is not set up. Please install and enable the MQTT integration, then try again.
